营业执照(三合一) 法人身份证 开户许可证
是 否

<model > <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_number" label="编号" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_app_no" label="申请单编号自动" type="String" length="200" formula="true" defaultValue="$fdNumber$" recalculateOnSave="true" />
<extendElementProperty name="fd_appr_dept" label="申请部门 " type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_approver" label="F申请人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_phone" label="联系电话 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_reason" label="用印事由 " type="String" length="" notNull="true" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3246294b5671a0" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_name" label="文件名称 " type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_copy" label="份数 " type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_type" label="用印类型" enumValues="公章|gz;法人章|frz;签字章|qzz;亲笔签字|qbqz;合同章|htz" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否开具介绍信" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3251f5d1a568aa" label="合同章明细表" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_name" label="合同（协议）名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_money" label="合同金额（万元）" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_currency" label="币种" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_copy" label="合同份数" type="Double" length="10" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_number" label="合同编号" type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件" enumValues="营业执照(三合一)|A;法人身份证|D;开户许可证|E" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_other_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件其他" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_jsx" label="是否开具介绍信1" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_type" label="是否开具公司介绍信" enumValues="是|yes;否|no" type="String" formula="true" defaultValue="$fd_is_htz$ .equals('否' ) " /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_org" label="前往单位" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_name" label="办理人姓名 " type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_reason" label="办理事由" type="String" length="" />
</model>

<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_type" label="用印类型" enumValues="公章|gz;电子签章(公章)|dzqzgz;法人章|frz;法人签字章|qzz;亲笔签字|qbqz;合同章|htz;党总支章|dzzz;工会公章|ghz;团总支章|tzzz;部门章|bmz;其他|qt" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_39b08d8a51c0ae" label="其他用印类型" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否开具介绍信" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3251f5d1a568aa" label="合同章明细表" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_name" label="合同（协议）名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_money" label="合同金额（万元）" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_currency" label="币种" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_copy" label="合同份数" type="Double" length="10" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_number" label="合同编号" type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件" enumValues="营业执照(三合一)|A;法人身份证|D;开户许可证|E" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_other_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件其他" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_jsx" label="是否开具介绍信1" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_type" label="是否开具公司介绍信" enumValues="是|yes;否|no" type="String" formula="true" defaultValue="$fd_is_htz$ .equals('否' ) " /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_org" label="前往单位" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_name" label="办理人姓名 " type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_reason" label="办理事由" type="String" length="" />
</model>

公章 法人章 法人签字章 法定代表人亲笔签字 党总支书记亲笔签字 党总支章 工会公章 团总支章 部门章 人事章 财务章 党总支书记签字章 账单专用章 投标专用章 报价章 其他

是 否

<model > <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_number" label="编号" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_app_no" label="申请单编号自动" type="String" length="200" formula="true" defaultValue="$fdNumber$" recalculateOnSave="true" />
<extendElementProperty name="fd_appr_dept" label="申请部门 " type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_approver" label="F申请人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_phone" label="联系电话 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_reason" label="用印事由 " type="String" length="" notNull="true" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3246294b5671a0" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_name" label="文件名称 " type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_copy" label="份数 " type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c1cac7c9fc492" label="报价金额" type="Double" length="10" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否开具介绍信" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_type" label="用印类型" enumValues="公章|gz;法人章|frz;法人签字章|frqzz;法定代表人亲笔签字|fdqz;党总支书记亲笔签字|dzqz;党总支章|dzzz;工会公章|ghz;团总支章|tzzz;部门章|bmz;人事章|rsz;财务章|cwz;党总支书记签字章|dzzqzz;账单专用章|zdzyz;投标专用章|tbzyz;报价章|quote;其他|qt" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_39b08d8a51c0ae" label="其他用印类型" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件" enumValues="营业执照(三合一)|A;法人身份证|D;开户许可证|E" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_other_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件其他" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_jsx" label="是否开具介绍信1" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_type" label="是否开具公司介绍信" enumValues="是|yes;否|no" type="String" formula="true" defaultValue="$fd_is_htz$ .equals('否' ) " /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_org" label="前往单位" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_name" label="办理人姓名 " type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_reason" label="办理事由" type="String" length="" />
</model>

<model > <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_number" label="编号" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_app_no" label="申请单编号自动" type="String" length="200" formula="true" defaultValue="$fdNumber$" recalculateOnSave="true" />
<extendElementProperty name="fd_appr_dept" label="申请部门 " type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_approver" label="F申请人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_phone" label="联系电话 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_reason" label="用印事由 " type="String" length="" notNull="true" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3246294b5671a0" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_name" label="文件名称 " type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_detail_copy" label="份数 " type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c1cac7c9fc492" label="报价金额" type="Double" length="10" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否开具介绍信" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_seal_type" label="用印类型" enumValues="公章|gz;法人章|frz;法人签字章|frqzz;法定代表人亲笔签字|fdqz;党总支书记亲笔签字|dzqz;党总支章|dzzz;工会公章|ghz;团总支章|tzzz;部门章|bmz;人事章|rsz;财务章|cwz;党总支书记签字章|dzzqzz;账单专用章|zdzyz;投标专用章|tbzyz;报价章|quote;工会公章|union;工会专用财务章|finance;其他|qt" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_39b08d8a51c0ae" label="其他用印类型" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件" enumValues="营业执照(三合一)|A;法人身份证|D;开户许可证|E" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_copy_other_type" label="需提供的相关资质复印件其他" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_jsx" label="是否开具介绍信1" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_type" label="是否开具公司介绍信" enumValues="是|yes;否|no" type="String" formula="true" defaultValue="$fd_is_htz$ .equals('否' ) " /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_org" label="前往单位" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_name" label="办理人姓名 " type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_intro_reason" label="办理事由" type="String" length="" />
</model>
